name: chainlink-convergence-hackathon
description: Oracle Court — constitutional AI risk governor workflow on Chainlink CRE

scripts.simulate:oracle-court: bun run sync:oracle-court:config && cre workflow simulate ./src/workflows/oracle-court --target local-simulation --non-interactive --trigger-index 0
scripts.simulate:oracle-court:broadcast: bash -o pipefail -c 'bun run sync:oracle-court:config && mkdir -p artifacts && tmp=$(mktemp) && if cre workflow simulate ./src/workflows/oracle-court --target local-simulation --non-interactive --trigger-index 0 --broadcast | tee "$tmp"; then cp "$tmp" artifacts/oracle-court-sim-latest.log && cp "$tmp" artifacts/oracle-court-simulation-output.txt && bun scripts/generate-oracle-court-proof.ts; else rm -f "$tmp"; exit 1; fi'
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run compile:all
